ValidationRule.description: 若考勤信息门店为空，则补签必填
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CheckInSupplementary' , ISBLANK( Attendance__r.Shop__c ), ISBLANK( Shop__c )), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CheckOutSupplementary' , ISBLANK( Attendance__r.CheckOutShop__c ), ISBLANK( Shop__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 考勤中门店为空，则补签门店为必填
